texto: Being stuck is a position few of us like. We want something new but cannot let go of the old-old ideas beliefs habits even thoughts. We are out of contact with our own genius. Sometimes we know we are stuck sometimes we don't. In both cases we have to do something.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Inga Teekens: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Being stuck is a position few of us like. We want something new but cannot let go of the old-old …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que desenvolvimento-pessoal, creating, positive pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e positive.
